hooks.command: if [ -f apps/api/package.json ]; then pnpm --filter ./apps/api typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
if [ -f apps/web/package.json ]; then pnpm --filter ./apps/web typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
if [ -f packages/contracts/package.json ]; then pnpm --filter ./packages/contracts build 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

echo '[superdev] Verifying stack is up before QA agent runs...' && curl -fsS http://localhost:3001/v1/readiness > /dev/null 2>&1 && curl -fsS http://localhost:3000 > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '[superdev] Stack OK' || echo '[superdev] ⚠ Stack not fully up — QA agent may fail. Run: pnpm dev:infra && pnpm dev'
